data.label: assimp
data.description: Open Asset Import Library 是一个可将多种 3D 文件格式加载为共享内存格式的库。它支持导入 40 多种文件格式，并支持数量持续增长的导出文件格式。

data.label: assimp
data.description: Open Asset Import Library is a library that loads various 3D file formats into a shared, in-memory format. It supports more than 40 file formats for import and a growing selection of file formats for export.
